scores.notes: All three features (config command, DB relation env vars, HTTP health check) are implemented. Uses event.workload, add_layer with combine=True, container.replan(), override:replace, and http check with url — all correct. However, relation data is read from relation.data[remote_unit] (iterating relation.units) rather than the gold standard's relation.data[relation.app] (app databag), which is less idiomatic for modern database interfaces. The _set_status_from_checks helper using ops.pebble.CheckLevel.READY and CheckStatus.DOWN is valid API. on-check-failure wired to the check name is correct.
